# SlopWash

> A native macOS utility that strips corporate jargon, AI slop, and vague language from any text — instantly.

## What it does

Highlight any text in any app (Slack, Chrome, Mail, Zoom). Press ⌘⇧W. SlopWash returns:
- **TL;DR** — one blunt sentence summary
- **TRUTH** — the actual intent behind the words, with jargon removed
- **ACTIONS** — who needs to do what, stated plainly
- **WASH** — a clean, direct rewrite you can copy and send

## Key facts

- One-time license. $14.99. No subscription.
- All AI processing runs locally on your macOS chip. No cloud. No telemetry. No servers.
- Works system-wide via a global hotkey — any app, any text field.
- Built by Amplified Intelligence.

## Who it's for

Knowledge workers, managers, and anyone drowning in corporate-speak, AI-generated filler, or passive-aggressive Slack messages who need the blunt truth fast.

## Purchase

Available at: https://ampedintel.gumroad.com/l/slopwash
